fieldDescription: Maximum number of factions to display in the overlay (sorted by relationship).
Only display factions with reputation -50 or worse (Hostile/Inhospitable). Helps focus on immediate threats.

fieldName: Show Only Factions in Current System
fieldDescription: Only show factions that have a market in the current star system. In hyperspace
minValue: behavior is controlled by the option below.

fieldDescription: When "Show only factions in current system" is on
minValue: in hyperspace show the full faction list instead of none. Reduces clutter in-system while avoiding an empty overlay while traveling.

fieldDescription: Text size for the overlay. Use [Large] for 4K or high-DPI displays.
[Toggle]: Press key to show or hide overlay. [Hold]: Overlay only visible while key is held.
Key to show or hide the faction relationship overlay on the campaign map. Set in Mod Settings (F2). Keycode 0 = unbound. Default: B.
When a faction relationship changes, show the change (e.g. +5 or -10) next to that faction for the duration set below.
How long to show the change next to a faction in the overlay, in seconds.
When a faction relationship changes, automatically show the overlay (for the duration set above).

0 = overlay stays until you hide it (relationship-change auto-show still uses the duration above). When > 0, overlay auto-hides after this many seconds whenever it is shown (hotkey, location change, or relationship change).
